# OPC Daily Signal

> AI-powered daily decision intelligence for one-person companies. Automated news filtering, analysis, and actionable briefings.

## What is OPC Daily Signal?

A daily intelligence system designed for OPC (One-Person Company) founders. Filters noise from 35+ platforms, applies first-principles analysis, and delivers actionable briefings with second-order thinking.

## Key Features

- Multi-platform monitoring (Douyin, Zhihu, Bilibili, Wall Street Journal CN, etc.)
- AI-powered relevance scoring against OPC survival formula
- Second-order consequence analysis
- Contrarian viewpoint generation
- Automated delivery via Telegram/WeChat/DingTalk
- Source attribution and fact verification

## OPC Survival Formula

Every signal is evaluated against: (Unit Price × Volume) / Time Investment > Cost

## Links

- Repository: https://github.com/MackDing/opc-daily-signal
- Author: https://github.com/MackDing
- OPC Hub: https://opc.ren
